name: Navidrome
compose:
name: slashnode-navidrome
services:
  server:
    image: deluan/navidrome:0.62.0
    container_name: server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - server_data:/data
      - server_shared-data-storage-downloads-music:/music
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:4533:4533
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data:
    name: slashnode-navidrome_server_data
  server_shared-data-storage-downloads-music:
    name: slashnode-navidrome_server_shared-data-storage-downloads-music
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (navidrome). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://www.navidrome.org/.
